description: Install 2,548 square foot, pre-engineered metal building to be used for a Reception Hall / Dance Hall as per plans

Cut off existing steel piles to indicated elevations, fill top portion of the piles as indicated and reinforcing in the top portion of the tension piles extending into the pile cap, excavate for pile caps, and install the mass reinforced concrete pile caps with embedded anchor plates and anchor bolts and pedestal dowels, as indicated in the Contract Documents. The complete steel erection of a large span open pipe truss canopy structure measuring approximately 482’-0” long by 134’-0” wide, height varies. Steel erection for this phase of the permit includes all vertical and horizontal members and includes the construction of three temporary shoring towers.
